mapper.select: SELECT id, coupon_id AS couponId, user_id AS userId, coupon_code AS couponCode, status, create_time AS createTime FROM coupon_order WHERE coupon_id = ? AND user_id = ?
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon_order (coupon_id, user_id, coupon_code, status, create_time) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, NOW())
